falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5,200 (a 15% increase from current levels) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp upward breakout would contradict the 'bottom_2024_aug' pattern and suggest a blowoff top rather than a consolidation phase

falsification_conditions.condition: The 20-day moving average crosses above the 50-day moving average on high volume (>200% of 30-day average)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This bullish technical crossover would invalidate the HOLD signal by indicating a confirmed uptrend contrary to the pattern's expected behavior

falsification_conditions.condition: The Federal Reserve announces an emergency rate cut of 75 basis points or more within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a dramatic policy shift would create liquidity and demand that directly contradicts the blowoff score's implication of market exhaustion

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
